basics.name: Younes El Alami
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Fullstack Engineer specializing in Java/Spring Boot and React ecosystems with 10+ years building scalable web applications. Expert in microservices architecture, modern frontend development, and cloud-native solutions. Passionate about delivering high-quality, user-centric products from conception to deployment.

work.name: bruce.work
work.summary: Fullstack development of a digital recruitment solution and temporary employment platform.
highlights: Developing and maintaining the core recruitment platform and mobile applications using React Native, enabling job seekers and companies to seamlessly manage the end-to-end employment lifecycle.
Implementing backend microservices handling algorithms for job matching, automated contract generation, and timesheet management using Node.js and MongoDB.
Building reusable frontend components with React and Material-UI for the 'Bruce Entreprise' recruiter dashboard, providing a Kanban-style interface for applicant tracking.
Managing cloud infrastructure and deploying scalable services on AWS, ensuring high availability for the platform's intensive administrative management systems.

work.name: Freelance Consulting
work.summary: Delivering end-to-end software solutions for clients as an independent consultant, from requirements gathering through deployment and maintenance.
highlights: Enterprise Mentoring Platform (mentoringbycgem.com): Implemented JWT-based authentication with RBAC. Setup devops and CI/CD on portainer.io and github. Built responsive React dashboard with TS, real-time notifications, chat, calendar. Architected Node.js/Express backend.

SaaS PDF Platform: Architected serverless microservices backend using Java/Spring Boot and Next.js frontend. Designed scalable REST APIs handling concurrent file operations. Implemented IAC using Terraform managing S3, API Gateway, Lambda, CloudWatch, and DynamoDB. Integrated Stripe and OAuth2.

work.name: RWS
work.summary: Contributed to Tridion Docs, a market-leading enterprise Component Content Management System serving Fortune 500 clients.
highlights: Backend Modernization: Migrated 15+ legacy services to Spring Boot microservices, reducing deployment time by 40%.
Designed RESTful APIs with comprehensive Swagger documentation.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries reducing response times from 2s to 300ms.
Implemented event-driven architecture using Kafka for async processing workflows.
Frontend Modernization: Led migration from legacy jQuery/JSP to React with TS, Redux, and React Query.
Established Yarn Workspaces and Turborepo monorepo reducing build times.

work.name: Zalando SE
work.summary: Platform Engineering team responsible for developer experience, deployment automation, and internal tooling consolidation for 2,000+ engineers.
highlights: Architected enterprise-grade CI/CD platform processing 5,000+ builds daily.
Built backend microservices handling build orchestration and deployment automation.
Implemented webhook integrations with GitHub, Slack, and PagerDuty.
Built React/Redux frontend application for real-time build visualization.
Migrated React/TS tooling to a unified developer portal using Backstage plugin architecture.
Configured Webpack module federation enabling micro-frontend architecture.

work.name: Danske Bank
work.summary: Focused on improving the user experience of the main bank's website and mobile app.
highlights: Creating low-level design documents for user requirements.
Creating MicroServices using Spring Boot and consuming them in React-Native mobile application.
Maintaining and implementing new features with React (ES6, Redux, Storybook, GraphQL, Webpack).

work.name: BAE Systems Applied Intelligence
work.summary: Developed defense software for big data search, investigation, and monitoring.
highlights: Developing MicroServices Restful APIs with SpringBoot.
Integrating the MicroServices into a client React application using ES6, Redux, Storybook, GraphQL, Webpack.
Optimizing and Upgrading Elasticsearch databases, search queries, and schema.
Migrating frontend projects from Marionette to React.

work.name: iPrice Group Sdn Bhd
work.summary: Worked on a meta e-commerce site, CMS tools, and integrated partner site pages.
highlights: Architecting and implementing a products categorization tool (Angular2/Symphony/Spring Boot).
Developing and maintaining a performant e-commerce website.
Enhancing page load speed and SEO using AMP, Spring Boot, Elasticsearch.

work.name: Tractive Sdn Bhd
work.summary: Led the technology department, managed IT resources, and worked on human-computer interaction technologies.
highlights: Developing innovative solutions with C#/WPF and Vanilla JS.

work.name: SmartSurface Sdn Bhd
work.summary: Participated in the full software development lifecycle to meet client needs.
highlights: Working with C#/WPF.
